description: Add group name s to the mpoints in range. Use of the group logic is described in Groups . This command may take the form mpoint group "slotname=groupname" — quotation marks required, — where slotname is the slot assignent and groupname is the group name.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove s from the mpoints. If a slot is not specified, the group name is removed from all slots where it is found.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to the slot named s . If not supplied, a group name created by the command is assigned to the named Default .
